title: Pop-up Menu ( PopupMenu)
text: Pop-up Menu ( PopupMenu) Determines whether clicking the right mouse button on the map activates a pop-up menu that displays the polygon titles. True (default) or False . PopupMenu = " True | False " Value Description True (default) The popup menu can be displayed. The end user can select enabled polygons using this menu False The popup menu cannot be displayed Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(MAP) = "popupmenu=false" Copy Applies To umap (Map) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
